span.p:
Session Gateway
WebSocket handshake, join, leave, heartbeats

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Access Verifier
Validate session ticket and effective role

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bootstrap Loader
Fetch latest head snapshot and room state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Operation Intake
Normalize ops and reject malformed payloads

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Offline Resync Coordinator
Deduplicate replayed ops and recover after reconnect

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CRDT Sync Engine
Merge concurrent edits and converge state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Presence Manager
Track cursor, selection, online state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Event Broadcaster
Fan-out ops, presence, reload, AI markers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Checkpoint Publisher
